semantic.role: Internal path normalization utility that converts arbitrary OS-specific paths to a canonical POSIX-separator, repo-relative format.
responsibilities: Replace backslashes with forward slashes to enforce POSIX path separators.
Strip leading './' and '/' to ensure repo-relative logical paths.
Provide a single deterministic normalization function used across all database and file system index operations.
outOfScope: File system I/O, path resolution, or directory traversal.
Handling of network paths or absolute file system paths.
invariants: Output always uses forward slashes as separators.
The function is pure and deterministic: same input always produces same output.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a single standard for representing repository file paths internally, ensuring consistency in database primary keys and across all modules.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial implementation of canonical path normalization for ArchSpine v1.0.0.

publicSurface.description: Normalizes a raw file system path string to a canonical repo-relative path with forward slashes. Input backslashes are replaced, and leading './' or '/' are removed. Used by all modules that interact with the database and file system indices.
